title: Add evidence-bound operator recall
goal: Create an episodic recall contract and exporter from receipts, PRs, Bureau tasks and friction records, optionally consumable by heimlern for offline learning.

acceptance.assertion: Recall item contract contains topic, situation, attempt, result, learned rule, evidence refs and does_not_establish entries.
Recall items cannot be created without at least one concrete evidence reference to receipt, PR, Bureau task or friction record.
Any heimlern integration is offline/proposal-only and cannot alter live routing, merge policy or task completion.
Focused tests cover valid recall, rejected free-form memory and missing-evidence failure.

metadata.non_goal: Does not create free-form chat memory or a policy oracle.
metadata.verification_note: Grabowski PR #116 merged and added read-only grabowski_operator_recall_export. The implementation creates evidence-ref-bound recall items from caller-supplied receipt, PR, Bureau task and friction records, labels source_trust as caller_supplied_unverified, requires concrete evidence refs, preserves non-claims, and keeps Heimlern usage offline/proposal-only.

validated_acceptance.recall-contract: PR #116 adds recall items with topic, situation, attempt, result, learned_rule, learned_rule_trust, evidence_refs and does_not_establish.
validated_acceptance.evidence-bound: PR #116 requires at least one concrete evidence ref and rejects unsupported item sources, source/evidence mismatches, malformed IDs and free-form memory without evidence.
validated_acceptance.offline-learning: PR #116 exposes heimlern_offline_learning as offline_proposal_only and explicitly does not establish live routing, merge policy or task completion.
validated_acceptance.tests: PR #116 adds focused recall tests for valid exports, free-form rejection, missing evidence, malformed IDs, unsupported keys, source/evidence mismatch, learned-rule trust, bounded rejected sources, docs and runtime import.

validation.local: make validate passed with 680 tests before merge
validation.github_ci: validate 3.10 and validate 3.12 succeeded before merge
validation.review_gate: Self-review was bound to head 736042dfdee7d269c635112ea2cdd38609c6f704 and diff b77e8d8198e5cb7133906bd3127d3bebc722ff6bee43047fb0cf89be0c261e0d before merge.
